info.name: Files Watermark
info.summary: Apply configurable watermarks to files stored in Nextcloud
info.description:
Protect your documents from unauthorized distribution by applying text or image watermarks to PDFs and images.
Features: - Text watermarks with dynamic placeholders ({username}, {email}, {date}, {filename}) - Image watermarks (logo overlay) - Combined text + image watermarks - On-demand watermarking via file action menu - On-download watermarking (original file untouched) - On-share watermarking - Admin-configurable global and per-group policies - Full audit log of every watermark event
info.author: files_watermark contributors
